GenAiFunction.description: Checks if a test drive time slot is available at a dealership. Call this action after the customer provides a preferred date and time slot. You must have the dealership ID from the previous "Find Nearest Dealership" action. The time slot must be exactly one of: "Morning", "Afternoon", or "Evening". If the customer gives a specific time, convert it: before 12 PM = "Morning", 12 PM to 4 PM = "Afternoon", after 4 PM = "Evening". If the slot is unavailable, share the alternative slots with the customer and ask them to pick a different slot or date. Re-call this action with their new choice.
